data.title: QuickBooks Payroll named easiest software for beginners in 2026 by Consumer365 for its guided setup and ease of use.
data.description: In a recent report on January 10, 2026, Consumer365 has awarded QuickBooks Payroll the title of the most user-friendly payroll software for novices. The software was lauded for its structured onboarding process, user-friendly interface, and capacity to simplify tasks for new employers. This acknowledgment underscores the increasing value of QuickBooks Payroll in the market.

data.title: Travelers face insurance claims after U.S.-Venezuela tensions; Squaremouth assisting. Jan 10, 2026. Many travelers affected.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida as of January 10, 2026, a significant number of individuals returning from Venezuela, the Caribbean, and neighboring nations are grappling with financial setbacks and submitting insurance claims due to the heightened tensions between the U.S. and Venezuela. Throughout early January, the FAA has been monitoring the situation closely to ensure the safety and security of travelers.

data.title: SeaVerse introduces the world's first AI-native platform, "All in AI Native," on Jan. 10, 2026, incorporating large language models, image and video generation.
data.description: In Singapore on January 10, 2026, SeaVerse revealed the worldwide introduction of the first AI-native creation and deployment platform. This innovative platform integrates large language models, image generation, video generation, and AI agents, allowing users to utilize various AI capabilities for content creation and deployment.

data.title: In 2026, QuickBooks Payroll is rated as the top all-in-one solution by Consumer365 for payroll and time tracking.
data.description: A recent report by Consumer365 delves into the evolution of payroll software to meet the demands of the contemporary workforce. The review identifies QuickBooks Payroll as the premier payroll system integrated with time tracking capabilities, aligning with today's standards for precision, compliance, and efficiency. This analysis underscores the significance of advancements in technology to cater to the dynamic needs of businesses in the digital age.

data.title: QuickBooks Payroll named top choice for small businesses in 2026 by Expert Consumers.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 10, 2026, Expert Consumers, a reputable consumer product review platform, has identified QuickBooks Payroll as the premier payroll software for small businesses in the current year. This acknowledgment is significant as it reflects a growing trend among small business proprietors opting for automated financial solutions.

data.title: QuickBooks named best billing software for businesses in 2026 for its simple invoicing & payments by Expert Consumers.
data.description: In a recent report released on January 10, 2026, Expert Consumers has identified QuickBooks as the top billing software for businesses for the year 2026. This acknowledgment underscores QuickBooks' commitment to enhancing invoicing processes, optimizing payment collection, and supporting businesses in achieving greater efficiency.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs see $681M outflow in 1st week of 2026 amid fading risk appetite. Geo risks drive investors to safer assets.
data.description: Bitcoin ETFs saw a turnaround in 2026 with a shift from inflows to outflows over four consecutive days. This change was driven by diminishing expectations of rate cuts and escalating geopolitical tensions, prompting investors to adopt a risk-averse approach.

data.title: Malco Group releases next-gen Aspen Mini Pumps with intelligent capacitance sensing & variable speed tech for mini-split installs.
data.description: The latest lineup of Aspen Mini Pumps, known for being the top choice of contractors in North America, is built on the foundation of reliability and performance. This new generation aims to streamline mini-split installations, decrease callbacks, and provide steady, exceptionally quiet operation. With these improvements, contractors now have one trusted option to rely on.

data.title: BluSky Restoration donates $307k+ to 200+ charities in 2025, in collaboration with partners, friends, and vendors.
data.description: In 2025, BluSky Restoration Contractors, LLC, a prominent property restoration company in the U.S., marked its charitable endeavors alongside partners, friends, and vendors. The company's philanthropic efforts for the year totaled more than $307,000 and benefited over 200 nonprofit organizations.

data.title: PadSplit expands into 4 new markets: Portland, Seattle, Sacramento, Nashville, addressing housing affordability crisis.
data.description: As housing affordability crisis intensifies, PadSplit, the nation's leading coliving platform, is expanding into four additional U.S. cities: Portland and Seattle. This move comes amidst growing concerns over housing costs, with reports showing a staggering increase in rent rates and a decrease in available affordable housing units. PadSplit's expansion aims to address this issue by providing shared living spaces at affordable prices, offering relief to individuals struggling to find suitable accommodation. The company's expansion into these new markets reflects a commitment to tackle the mounting housing crisis and provide viable housing solutions to those in need.

data.title: UMOM New Day Centers receives $1.5 million grant from Bob & Renee Parsons Foundation to support families facing homelessness.
data.description: A $1.5 million grant from The Bob & Renee Parsons Foundation has been awarded to UMOM New Day Centers in Phoenix on January 9, 2026. This three-year investment aims to expand crucial programs supporting parents and children in achieving stability and rebuilding their lives.

data.title: House of Heroes adds Marcelo Vieira, Maxwell, Mendieta, and Crosas to Legends Series LA. Barça and Real Madrid to clash on Feb 22.
data.description: Legendary players from Barcelona and Real Madrid are assembling star-studded lineups for their upcoming match on February 22 at BMO Stadium in Los Angeles. House of Heroes revealed that Marcelo Vieira da Silva Júnior, Maxwell, Gaizka Mendieta, and Marc Crosas are set to participate in the iconic clash. This highly-anticipated event is generating buzz with fans eagerly anticipating the showdown between these two historic teams. Don't miss out on this exciting matchup that promises to showcase top-tier talent and highlight the rich footballing history of these renowned clubs.

data.title: Martin & Company appoints Lani Cathey as new CEO, a leading insurance technology provider.
data.description: Lani Cathey has been selected to take on the role of CEO at Martin & Company, a prominent company based in Newtown Square, Pennsylvania. This announcement was made on January 9, 2026. Martin & Company specializes in offering insurance technology solutions and consulting services to insurance carriers and MGAs. Lani Cathey's appointment as CEO signifies a significant change in leadership for the company.

data.title: Encore Energy, Inc. reports 2026 horizontal Berea drilling and production progress in Lawrence County, Kentucky with two successful oil wells.
data.description: Encore Energy, Inc. has released a positive update on its current horizontal Berea drilling and production operations in Lawrence County, Kentucky. The company, based in BOWLING GREEN, Ky., reported on Jan. 9, 2026, that it has completed the drilling of two horizontal Berea oil wells. This news marks a significant development for Encore as they continue to focus on enhancing their production capabilities in the region.

data.title: Focus Vitamins introduces preservative-free artificial tears - Focus Tears PF. Get 15% off with code TPFMEDIA by March 15, 2026.
data.description: Focus Vitamins has introduced Focus Tears PF, a preservative-free eye drop product available in single-dose vials for customer convenience. To avail of a 15% discount, customers can use the code TPFMEDIA until March 15, 2026. This innovative product launch came from Focus Vitamins, known for their commitment to evidence-based eye health solutions. The company is based in MANASSAS, Va., and the announcement was made on Jan. 9, 2026.

data.title: Sex coach Caitlin V announces "From Pressure to Power" virtual summit on men's sexuality, helping with lasting longer in bed. Event on January 17, 2026, registration at caitlinvneal.com/from-pressure-to-power-summit.
data.description: A live virtual event lasting half a day will take place on January 17, 2026, focusing on providing science-backed resources for enhancing confidence, performance, and fostering connections. To participate, individuals can register at caitlinvneal.com/from-pressure-to-power-summit. The event will be held in Los Angeles and was announced on January 9, 2026, through a press release distributed via PRNewswire-PRWeb. The event aims to address issues related to male loneliness and sexual disconnection.

data.title: Platform Pump.fun revamping creator fees amid concerns of skewed incentives. New system allows fees split across 10 wallets, transfer ownership, and update authority revocation.
data.description: Pump.fun has launched a novel system where creators can now share fees with teams and CTO admins. This innovative feature allows fees to be divided among as many as 10 wallets. Additionally, users can transfer coin ownership and take away update authority.

data.title: China's HENGLIN to launch Intelligent Office Chair 800 at imm cologne 2026 with a "Dynamic Spine-Care Ecosystem."
data.description: In Cologne, Germany, on January 10, 2026, HENGLIN, a prominent player in China's furniture sector, is set to unveil their latest product - the HENGLIN 800 chair at imm cologne 2026. This innovative chair is equipped with a smart system designed to provide optimal support for the spine.

data.title: Amazon plans to open large retail store in Orland Park on 35-acre site, at 159th Street and LaGrange Road.
data.description: E-commerce giant Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) is planning to establish a significant retail presence in Orland Park, Illinois. The proposed location at the former Petey's II restaurant site, located at the intersection of 159th Street and LaGrange Road, spans about 35 acres. This move marks Amazon's expansion into brick-and-mortar retail on a large scale. Amazon, ranked among the top five global retailers, is ramping up its physical store footprint with this strategic development. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: IFEZ presents Incheon as 'AI City' at CES 2026, in Las Vegas. Promotes vision at Global AI City Forum.
data.description: The CES 2026 witnessed the debut of the Incheon Free Economic Zone Authority's (IFEZ) booth promoting IFEZ's AI City vision. Held in Las Vegas on Jan. 10, 2026, the Pavilion at CES showcased IFEZ's commitment to innovation. The Global AI City Forum was a significant part of this initiative, highlighting the city's technological advancements. The event attracted a diverse audience, with approximately [X] attendees exploring the potential of IFEZ's vision.
